name: (2da P) Consulta_datos 1- 7
(2da P) Consulta_datos 2- 7
(2da P) Consulta_datos 3- 7
(2da P) Consulta_datos 4- 7
query:
// ===========================================
// A* (PESO = tiempo_estimado)
// ===========================================

MATCH (source:Almacen {id:'A1'}),
      (target:PuntoEntrega {id:'P1'})

CALL gds.shortestPath.astar.stream('logisticsGraph', {
    sourceNode: id(source),
    targetNode: id(target),
    relationshipWeightProperty: 'tiempo_estimado',
    latitudeProperty: 'lat',
    longitudeProperty: 'lon'
})
YIELD totalCost, nodeIds

WITH totalCost,
     [nodeId IN nodeIds | gds.util.asNode(nodeId)] AS nodes

UNWIND range(0, size(nodes)-2) AS i
WITH totalCost, nodes[i] AS n1, nodes[i+1] AS n2

MATCH (n1)-[r:CONECTA_A]->(n2)

RETURN
'A*' AS algoritmo,
totalCost AS costo_total,
n1, r, n2;
